metadata.title: The Weighted Decision Matrix: A Complete Guide (with a free tool)

metadata.description: What a weighted decision matrix is and how to build one step by step — choose criteria, set weights, score your options. With two worked examples and a free tool that does the math.
metadata.title: The Weighted Decision Matrix: A Complete Guide (with a free tool)

author.name: Hoot the Unflappable is AskHoot's Chief Decision Owl

metadata.description: The factors you judge a decision on can make or break the outcome. How to choose decision criteria that are distinct, directional, and honest — and the trap to avoid.
metadata.title: How to Choose Decision Criteria (Without Fooling Yourself)

author.name: Hoot the Unflappable is AskHoot's Chief Decision Owl

metadata.description: A pros-and-cons list is fast; a weighted decision matrix is fairer when it matters. The two blind spots of pros-and-cons lists — and when to use each.
metadata.title: Weighted Matrix vs. a Pros-and-Cons List: Which Should You Use?
